merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when U.S. Ambassador to Ceylon Cecil B. Lyon presented credentials to the Maldives, remaining resident at Colombo.

evidence.quote: On April 9, 1966, U.S. Ambassador to Ceylon Cecil B. Lyon presented his credentials to the Maldives; he remained resident at Colombo.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record diplomatic relations established on 1966-04-09 with Ambassador Nonresident status (ambassador resident at Colombo).
